ddls:
CREATE TABLE "file_system_entities" (
  "file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file system entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the file or directory */,
  "parent_file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent file system entity (null for root directories) */,
  "is_file" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the entity is a file (true) or a directory (false) */,
  "last_observed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last observation of the entity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entity was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the entity */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entity was last modified */,
  "size_in_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes (null for directories) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file (null for directories) */,
  "path" TEXT /* Full path of the file or directory */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the entity is hidden */,
  "last_accessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last accessed the entity */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_system_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_system_entities_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_system_entities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_system_entities_last_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_system_entities_parent_file_system_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_file_system_entity_id") REFERENCES file_system_entities ("file_system_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file system entity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_system_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_system_entity_id") REFERENCES file_system_entities ("file_system_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file system entity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has read access */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has write access */,
  "delete_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has delete access */,
  "execute_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has execute access */,
  "inherit_permissions" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permissions are inherited from the parent directory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_file_system_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_system_entity_id") REFERENCES file_system_entities ("file_system_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory */,
  "file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file system entity (foreign key to file_system_entities) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the directory */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the directory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the directory was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the directory */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the directory was last modified */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing the default permissions for the directory */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the directory is shared with other users or groups */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* JSON object listing the users or groups the directory is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_file_system_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_system_entity_id") REFERENCES file_system_entities ("file_system_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_system_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file system entity (foreign key to file_system_entities) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, txt, pdf) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last modified */,
  "size_in_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used to encrypt the file (if applicable) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file for better file handling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_system_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_system_entity_id") REFERENCES file_system_entities ("file_system_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file (foreign key to files) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "size_in_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file version for data integrity verification */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file version is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used to encrypt the file version (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_search" (
  "file_search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search index entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file (foreign key to files) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, txt, pdf) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON object containing tags for the file for better categorization and search */,
  "is_indexed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is indexed for search */,
  "last_indexed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last indexed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_search_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
